title: EPOS ERIC Procurement rules
author: Piraa, Diana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
These Procurement Rules apply to all contracts concerning the procurement of goods, works, or services concluded in writing between the EPOS ERIC and a party or parties. The Procurement Rules only apply to procurement contracts financed by the EPOS ERIC’s budget and carried out by the EPOS ERIC or on behalf of the EPOS ERIC. 
 All procedures for awarding contracts by EPOS ERIC shall respect the EU principles of transparency, non-discrimination, and competition, as well as proportionality, mutual recognition, and equal treatment.
steps_raw:
